abilities.name: Icon of Obstinacy
abilities.text: Each time an attack targets this model's unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than or equal to the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Rampart
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Terminator Assault Squad
■ Terminator Squad

abilities.name: Inspiring Commander
abilities.text: ‘If you include this model in your army, until the end of the battle, non-Character models in Terminator Assault Squad and Terminator Squad units from your army have an Objective Control characteristic of 2 while they are not Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Oath of Rynn
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the start of either player’s Command phase, this model can use this ability. When it does, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit.

abilities.name: To the Last
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Below Half-strength.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Company Heroes
■ Bladeguard Veteran Squad
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad
■ Tactical Squad

abilities.name: Inspiring Commander
abilities.text:
If you include this model in your army, until the end of the battle, non-Character models in Sternguard
Veteran Squad units from your army have an Objective Control characteristic of 2 while they are not Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Signum Array
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Siege Captain
abilities.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Monster, Vehicle, or Fortification unit, improve the Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Aggressor Squad
■ Eradicator Squad
■ Heavy Intercessor Squad
